title: PAIK External Service
description: A third-party dependency this project calls but does not operate (a payment processor, a mapping/geocoding API, ...) - no repository, environments, or configuration of its own. See SPEC.md section 5.

docs_url.description: Link to the vendor's API documentation

contract_ref.description: Optional link to an internal knowledge-base page about the contract/SLA/DPA - never the contract itself

data_shared.description: Optional free-text note on what data flows to this vendor, e.g. "payment card tokens, vendor-hosted checkout"
